name: list-item
description: A single row in a list: an optional leading icon, content, and optional trailing icon or metadata. The building block of feature lists, checklists, and menus.

leadingIcon.description: Show a leading icon (e.g. a check).

trailing.description: Trailing affordance: nothing, an icon, or a short metadata label.

align.description: Vertical alignment of the row when content wraps to multiple lines.

a11y.contrast: Content meets 4.5:1; the leading icon meets 3:1 as non-text.
notes: Rendered inside a semantic list (ul/ol); each item is a listitem.
A decorative leading icon is hidden from assistive tech; the meaning lives in the content text.

elementor.notes: Compiles to an item within the Elementor Icon List widget (or a Container row for richer trailing content).
